query:
SELECT u.id, u.email, u.name, u.role, e.companyName, e.companyCode 
FROM users u 
JOIN erp_companies e ON u.erpCompanyId = e.id 
WHERE e.companyCode = 'TEST2';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2Wfg8FxM46VuY92.2046134b715b --database 5QtmwQJEy7EFv8QJHVh9i8 --execute SELECT u.id, u.email, u.name, u.role, e.companyName, e.companyCode 
FROM users u 
JOIN erp_companies e ON u.erpCompanyId = e.id 
WHERE e.companyCode = 'TEST2';
